title: Manhunt of Mystery Island
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Yakima Canutt, Wallace Grissell
writer: Albert DeMond, Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy
actors: Richard Bailey, Linda Stirling, Roy Barcroft
plot: The creator of a scientific device is kidnapped, and his daughter enlists the help of a private detective whose investigations lead them to a remote Pacific isle where they confront the evil and shocking descendants of a long-dead...
